## Workspace Instructions

- Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- Clarify project requirements if the user has not specified them.
- Scaffold the project in the current workspace root.
- Customize the project to meet the load flow simulator requirements.
- Install only required extensions if explicitly needed.
- Compile the project, resolve issues, and verify setup instructions.
- Create and run tasks if appropriate for the project.
- Launch only after the user confirms debug mode.
- Ensure README.md and this file stay current.

## Execution Guidelines

- Use the current directory as the workspace root.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow the requested project stack and development best practices.
